info.title: database
info.description: Utility package that allows you to interact with SQL Server databases hosted on Azure

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the minimum level used by the Microsoft logging framework. Supported values are Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error and Critical.  (Default: Information)

options.name: --environment-name
options.description: Environment name used by your application, where the connection string from the upstream database can be found. (Default: null)

options.name: --development-environment-name
options.description: Environment name used by your application for local development. (Default: Development)

options.name: --configuration-section
options.description: Section name where the database connection string can be found within the appsettings file. To represent JSON nesting, use colon (:) as a separator. (Default: ConnectionStrings:Default)
